prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-WATERPROOF-NOTEBOOK Product Type: BLANK_BOOK Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Waterproof Adventure Writing Journal Smudgeproof Personal Notebook Description: Now your notebook can go anywhere with you. Introducing the waterproof, smudge-poof, pocket-sized notebook from ASR Outdoor. Whether your'e camping, hiking, boating, fishing, or swimming, you can record anything into this journal without having to worry about it getting wet or smearing.

This notebook is compact and easy to transport and store at 3" x 5", but still has a full 50 sheets. It can easily be carried in any bag, backpack or pocket. The bright green cover makes it easy to spot and ideal for signalling in emergencies.

Notebook includes a compact graphite pencil. Whether its rain, hail, or snow, this notebook has you covered. Search Terms: write in the rain memo notepad minimalist writng instrument notebook 3x5 mini notes taking pad of paper education outdoor activities waterproof writing supplies notebook Features: - Compact | Waterproof | Smudgeproof (with Graphite Writing Tool) - Ideal for use in nature and other environmental situations in which a waterproof notepad may be necessary - Total Pages: 50 Sheets - Dimensions: 3" x 5" - Bright Colored Cover for Emergency Signaling and Ease of Use === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 3x5 Bright Green Waterproof Notebook

anthropic.title_differentiation: Waterproof And Smudgeproof, 50 Sheets, Pocket-Sized, Includes Graphite Pencil, Outdoor Writing Pad

openai.title_differentiation: Waterproof, Smudgeproof Writing Surface, Compact 3" X 5" Size, 50 Sheets, Bright Green Cover, Includes Pencil
